# 🎶 Vozz Rich - Electronic Press Kit (EPK) 🎶

## 🎤 About Vozz Rich

**Legal Name:** Richard Park  
**Stage Name:** **Vozz Rich**  
**Based In:** United States (Roots in Mexico & California)  
**Website:** [vozzrich.com](https://vozzrich.com/)  
**Email:** vozzrich@gmail.com  

**Biography:**  
US-based Producer and DJ with roots in Mexico and California. Vozz Rich blends sounds from diverse influences including Detroit house, underground raves, salsa, techno, and big room, creating a unique and captivating electronic music experience.

---

## 🎛️ Unique Sound & Production Techniques

- **🎵 Genre Fusion:** Seamlessly combines Detroit house, salsa, techno, and big room elements.
- **🔊 Innovative Production:** Utilizes advanced sound design to craft immersive and dynamic tracks.
- **🌟 Distinctive Style:** Draws inspiration from underground raves and various electronic subgenres, resulting in a unique audio signature.

---

## 📀 Notable Releases & Collaborations

- **"Back To The Beat"**  
  📅 *Released:* June 26, 2024

- **"Breathless" (feat. L25)**  
  📅 *Released:* July 26, 2024

- **"Butterflies - Vozz Rich Remix"** (with Artsychoke)  
  📅 *Released:* May 3, 2024

- **"Dance All Night - Vozz Rich Remix"** (with Jaytor)  
  📅 *Released:* July 12, 2024

- **"Get Up On The Floor"** (with Franz Kolo)  
  📅 *Released:* October 12, 2023

**📈 Total Releases:** 47 tracks, including original songs and remixes.

---
